name: Review Evidence Gate
purpose: Coordinate independent review roles before a work item can claim review completion.

roles.label: Code Review
acceptance_criteria: Findings lead with concrete defects, behavioral regressions, or missing verification.

roles.label: Security Review
acceptance_criteria: Security claims are either proven by evidence or called out as unresolved.

roles.label: Semantic Review
acceptance_criteria: Checks behavior against the plan, user intent, and known product constraints.

roles.label: Review Rollup
acceptance_criteria: Combines review evidence into one actionable decision without hiding disagreement.
